description: Square 'THE WORST FIRST' card. The background is a desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up photograph of a pair of hands cuffed in metal handcuffs against a dark body. A red diagonal banner runs across the top-right corner reading 'ATLANTA' in white serif caps. At the top left, in light cyan bold sans-serif caps, is the headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with a white sub-line '2/15/2025 | Atlanta, GA.' The name is set large in white bold sans-serif on the left: 'Hadi Mohammed Issah.' Below is a white 'CRIME:' label and a bulleted charge: 'Obscene internet contact w/child.' The bottom left carries the DHS seal beside the white 'ICE' wordmark; the bottom right has a red box with '-THE- WORST FIRST' in white serif. The color scheme is red, white and black with a cyan accent.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/15/2025 | Atlanta, GA; Hadi Mohammed Issah; CRIME: Obscene internet contact w/child; ATLANTA; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
